project_info.name: LLDv2 (Long Line Diary V2)
project_info.description: Professional construction site diary and operational command center for fitout PMs.
project_info.platform_context: Mobile-first for site walks, Desktop for command center.

principles: Tactical Clarity: Information density without noise. Every pixel must earn its rent.
Industrial Durability: The UI should feel like it can survive a drop on concrete.
One-Handed Speed: PMs carry a coffee or a helmet in one hand. Primary actions must be thumb-accessible.
Status is God: The state of a project (Blocked, On Track) is the most important data point.
No Fluff: Remove decorative gradients. Use borders and contrast to separate content.
anti_patterns: Soft, pillowy SaaS aesthetic (Inter font, big rounded corners, pastel purples).

typography.instructions: Import 'Barlow Condensed' (weights 400, 600, 700) and 'Public Sans' (weights 400, 500, 600) from Google Fonts. Use Barlow Condensed for all Headers, Card Titles, and Status Labels. Use Public Sans for body text, inputs, and tables.

layout_strategies.dashboard_grid: Bento Grid Mode B (High Density). Use 'grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4'. Cards should have 'h-full'.
layout_strategies.mobile_navigation: Bottom fixed navigation bar (5 items max). Operations (Walk, Diary, Gates) must be prominent.
layout_strategies.spacing_scale: Tailwind default but prioritized: p-4 (1rem), p-6 (1.5rem), gap-4 (1rem).

components.card_style: bg-card border border-border rounded-sm shadow-none hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-200
components.button_primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-sm font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase text-sm
components.button_secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-sm font-medium
components.status_badge: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide border

visual_enhancers.texture: Add a subtle noise texture to the main background to simulate concrete/asphalt.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly. Only for sticky headers: 'bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-border'.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'border-zinc-800' for subtle separation. Use 'border-l-4' colored borders to indicate status on cards.

icons.usage: Use icons as visual anchors for actions. Do not use them as decoration.

universal_guidelines: Always check contrast ratios. The dark theme must be accessible.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise.
Inputs must have a clear focus state (Ring Orange).
For tables, use dense padding 'py-2 px-3'.
All dates must be formatted 'dd MMM yyyy' or 'HH:mm' (24h) for precision.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a tool for professionals. Avoid 'Welcome, friend!' copy. Use 'System Ready' or 'Site Overview'. Prioritize density and speed. Implement the dark theme by default using the 'dark' class on the html element. Use the provided color palette in tailwind.config.js immediately.
